description: ADAS calibration requirements by operation and sensor type

windshield_replace.explanation: Forward camera is mounted to windshield. Any disturbance requires recalibration.
windshield_replace.oemNotes: ALL manufacturers require camera recalibration after windshield work

front_bumper_replace.explanation: Front radar module often mounted behind bumper cover. Parking sensors embedded in cover.
front_bumper_replace.oemNotes: Even if radar not removed, bumper alignment affects radar aim

front_bumper_repair.explanation: If radar area repainted, metal flake or film thickness may affect radar. Verify operation.
front_bumper_repair.oemNotes: Some OEMs prohibit metallic paint in radar zone

rear_bumper_replace.explanation: Blind spot sensors mounted in rear bumper corners. Position critical for proper operation.
rear_bumper_replace.oemNotes: Rear radar calibration typically requires road test

quarter_panel_work.explanation: Blind spot sensors may be mounted in quarter panel area near rear bumper
quarter_panel_work.oemNotes: Check sensor mounting location - varies by manufacturer

mirror_replace.explanation: Some vehicles have cameras or sensors integrated into mirrors
mirror_replace.oemNotes: Check if mirror contains camera or blind spot indicator

grille_replace.explanation: Some radar modules mounted behind grille area
grille_replace.oemNotes: Radar emblem or grille-mounted modules may be disturbed

headlight_replace.explanation: Headlight aim affects some camera systems that use headlight patterns

wheel_alignment.explanation: Alignment changes vehicle thrust angle which affects all directional sensors
wheel_alignment.oemNotes: Steering angle sensor reset required. ADAS verification recommended.

suspension_work.explanation: Suspension changes affect ride height and vehicle aim
suspension_work.oemNotes: Alignment required first, then ADAS calibration

structural_repair.explanation: Structural repairs affect all sensor mounting points and vehicle geometry
structural_repair.oemNotes: Full ADAS system verification required after structural repair

roof_replace.explanation: Roof-mounted sensors and windshield angle may be affected
roof_replace.oemNotes: Some vehicles have roof-mounted cameras or LiDAR

airbag_deploy.explanation: SRS components may share mounting with ADAS sensors

radar_zones.description: Areas where radar sensors look through body panels
radar_zones.requirement: No metallic or metal flake paint in radar detection zone
radar_zones.masking: Mask backside of bumper in radar zone during refinish
radar_zones.degReference: DEG #40336 - Bumper masking in radar zone NOT INCLUDED

camera_zones.description: Glass or covers in front of cameras
camera_zones.requirement: Keep clean, no tint, no aftermarket films in camera view area

tesla.notes: Tesla requires all ADAS recalibration through Tesla service or authorized body shop

subaru_eyesight.notes: Subaru EyeSight uses stereo cameras - both must be calibrated together

honda_sensing.notes: Honda Sensing combines camera and radar
specialRequirements: Check for TSBs on calibration procedures

toyota_safety_sense.notes: Toyota Safety Sense has multiple generations with different requirements

dynamic.description: Performed via road test at specific speeds

static_and_dynamic.description: Both static setup and road verification required
